allow: PowerShell(try { $prs = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/BhurkeSiddhesh/Docu-AI-Search/pulls?state=all&per_page=100" -ErrorAction Stop; $prs | Select-Object number, state, title, @{N='head';E={$_.head.ref}}, @{N='base';E={$_.base.ref}}, @{N='user';E={$_.user.login}}, draft, mergeable_state, created_at, updated_at, merged_at, @{N='merged';E={$_.merged_at -ne $null}} | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String -Width 300 } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $_" })
